turns.prompt: Use the docs-review temp repo already scaffolded here. Load using-agentic, route through executing-plans, follow the approved plan, run bun test before implementation so it fails, write the minimal docs-review implementation to pass, run review-spec before review-quality, then run fresh bun test verification and end review-ready. In your final printed logs include deterministic marker lines for install visibility, workflow route, approved plan, implementation write, review-spec, review-quality, fresh verify, and review-ready.

Continue the same installed OpenCode session with --continue. Make one more bounded docs-review write, rerun review-spec, rerun review-quality, rerun fresh bun test verification, and end review-ready with deterministic transcript markers for the continued write, rerun reviews, rerun verify, and review-ready.

Continue the same installed OpenCode session with --continue one final time. Make one more bounded docs-review write, rerun review-spec, rerun review-quality, rerun fresh bun test verification, and end review-ready with deterministic transcript markers for the final continued write, rerun reviews, rerun verify, and review-ready.
